diagrams.title: ARO DNS Flow
diagrams.description: How DNS queries travel from pods through CoreDNS, dnsmasq, and Azure DNS — including the 40-second timeout failure mode and custom DNS forwarder paths.
diagrams.author: Philip Smith

diagrams.title: ARO Networking
diagrams.description: Azure Red Hat OpenShift networking components — Public LB, Internal LB, NSG, Private Link, and OVN-Kubernetes overlay. Covers egress SNAT limits, NSG immutability, and API/Ingress visibility settings.
diagrams.author: unknown

diagrams.title: ROSA HCP Networking
diagrams.description: Cross-account architecture showing how the hosted control plane connects to customer worker nodes via AWS PrivateLink, including DNS, egress, and account boundary details.
diagrams.author: Philip Smith

diagrams.title: Konnectivity in HyperShift HCP
diagrams.description: How the control plane tunnels traffic to worker nodes across the network boundary in HyperShift — agent registration, the two-service architecture (:8090/:8091), proxy sidecars, and failure modes. Applies to ROSA HCP, ARO HCP, Agent-based, and KubeVirt.
diagrams.author: Philip Smith
